text: Harry Kane sends England into the round of 16 of the World Cup after 2-1 win against Congo - AP News
fullText: Harry Kane scored two second-half goals to help England rally for a 2-1 victory over Congo and a spot in the round of 16 at the World Cup. England’s all-time leading scorer evened the contest with a header after Brian Cipenga had given Congo a surprising half…
